summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of StudyBoard Trello-inspired task management app. All core features tested including authentication, CRUD operations, drag & drop, real-time collaboration, and UI/UX flows.
passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section and features
Auth page renders with login/register forms and Google OAuth button
GET /api/auth/me with valid session token - 100% success
Board CRUD: POST /api/boards, GET /api/boards, GET /api/boards/{id}, DELETE /api/boards/{id} - 100% success
List CRUD: POST /api/lists, PUT /api/lists/{id}, DELETE /api/lists/{id} - 100% success
Card CRUD: POST /api/cards, GET /api/cards/{id}, PUT /api/cards/{id}, DELETE /api/cards/{id} - 100% success
Dashboard page loads board list after authentication
Board view page loads with lists and cards
Create board dialog works with color selection
Card detail modal opens and saves changes
Auto-creation of 3 default lists (A faire, En cours, Termine)
Card tags, priority levels, due dates, checklists, comments
